subcodes.title: Words to Mahmud Zarqani, spoken on 1914-06-18
subcodes.first_line: You have worked very diligently over the compilation of these two volumes. During the first journey to Europe no one was thinking to do this work. Now and then Mirza Baqir Khan
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
